title: OpenAI Scholars 2020: Final projects
summary: Our third class of OpenAI Scholars presented their final projects at virtual Demo Day, showcasing their research results from over the past five months.
summaryZh: 我们的第三批OpenAI学者在虚拟演示日展示了他们的最终项目，展示了他们过去五个月的研究成果。
highlights: Our third class of OpenAI Scholars presented their final projects at virtual Demo Day, showcasing their research results from over the past five months.
highlightsZh: 我们的第三批OpenAI学者在虚拟演示日展示了他们的最终项目，展示了他们过去五个月的研究成果。
